name: LocalArchive
single_purpose: LocalArchive saves pages and selected text into a private local archive, supports Pocket CSV imports, and exports user-owned Markdown, HTML, or JSON files.

permission_justifications.activeTab: Used only after the user clicks the toolbar action or a LocalArchive context menu item so the current page can be captured.
permission_justifications.contextMenus: Adds user-triggered commands for saving a page or selected text.
permission_justifications.downloads: Creates user-requested Markdown, HTML, or JSON exports.
permission_justifications.scripting: Injects a local extractor script into the active tab only after user action.
permission_justifications.sidePanel: Opens the local archive library in Chrome's side panel.

data_categories: Website content and page text selected or captured by the user
Web browsing activity limited to saved page URLs, domains, titles, and metadata
User-provided imported Pocket CSV or JSON backup data
privacy_practices.storage: All archive data is stored locally in the user's Chrome profile with IndexedDB.
privacy_practices.network: The extension does not send captured pages, selected text, imports, exports, search queries, or archive metadata to a server.
privacy_practices.limited_use: Use of information received from Chrome APIs complies with the Chrome Web Store User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements.
privacy_practices.ads_or_sale: No ads, analytics, sale of user data, or third-party transfer.

reviewer_notes: No account, login, API key, backend, or paid service is required.
The extension does not work on chrome:// pages, the Chrome Web Store, or browser-restricted pages where Chrome blocks extension injection.
Use https://localarchive.pages.dev/review/ for exact smoke-test steps and sample Pocket CSV content.
